decision.overall_recommendation: VIX gate is open, so new entries are permissible, but this shortlist is thin ML/pattern support beneath a strong top pick and heavy crypto-adjacent concentration lower down — size positions conservatively and prioritize BB and BTDR over the two Double-Top names. Model track records (ML edge accuracy and this system's own pick win-rate) don't yet have sufficient sample size to calibrate confidence, so MLEdgeFlag calls below are taken at face value rather than adjusted for reliability. Existing Webull positions (BNO, NEXT, HELP) are labeled 'Unknown' sector so no direct sector overlap is measurable, but note the shortlist itself is Technology-heavy (BB, BTDR, CORZ) with three of five names (BTDR, CORZ, CIFR) economically tied to Bitcoin mining/crypto infrastructure despite CIFR's 'Financial Services' label — treat these as correlated, not diversified, if taking multiple positions.

ranked_picks.rationale: Highest SmartScore in the batch with a clean 5.29:1 plan, a confirmed Double Bottom already breaking out, and all-timeframe bullish alignment; MLEdgePct is only marginally positive (0.26%) so it's not a standout confirming signal but isn't a detractor either.
